objective: Take only liquid, high-conviction threshold trades. Avoid narrow bucket markets where the scanner systematically loses.

rationale.v3_changes: Added allowed_settlement_rules to block between_inclusive (bucket) markets. Of 9 settled paper trades, 8 were bucket trades with 1W/7L. The single win was a high-variance NO bet. Bucket markets have narrow 2F windows that are inherently low-probability and the scanner is taking large SELL positions at high prices that lose frequently. Threshold markets (lte/gt) better match the calibration models distributional edge.
